case_title: ROSALES LAW PARTNERS LLP VS. ROBERT E. SIMMS LLC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED SEP-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT E. SIMMS LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROSALES LAW PARTNERS LLP AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT E. SIMMS LLC. SIMMS, ROBERT E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ROBERT E. SIMMS, INDIVIDUAL. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IT INDICATES PERSONAL SERVICE AND SUBSTITUTE SERVICE, CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST RE-SERVE PROOF OF SERVICE, ON THE CROSS-DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROBERT E. SIMMS LLC. SIMMS, ROBERT E AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROSALES LAW PARTNERS LLP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
